title: MedPMC: A Systematic Framework for Scaling High-Fidelity Medical Multimodal Data for Foundation Models
innovation_summary: MedPMC: A Systematic Framework for Scaling High-Fidelity Medical Multimodal Data for Foundation Models: We introduce MedPMC, an automated, continuously updatable framework that transforms permissively licensed literature into high-fidelity infrastructure for medical multimodal models.
